FragmentEntryLink.__html: A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
FragmentEntryLink.__editableValues:
{"com.liferay.fragment.entry.processor.editable.EditableFragmentEntryProcessor":{"element-text":{"sv_SE":"Internt serverfel","defaultValue":"
	A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with
	a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of
	formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
","pt_BR":"Erro interno do servidor","fr_FR":"Erreur Interne Du Serveur","ja_JP":"内部サーバエラー","ca_ES":"Error intern del servidor","de_DE":"Interner Serverfehler","hu_HU":"Belső szerverhiba","ar_SA":"خطأ خادم داخلي","fi_FI":"Virhe palvelussa","en_US":"Internal Server Error","es_ES":"Error interno del servidor","zh_CN":"内部服务器错误","config":{"mapperType":"link"},"nl_NL":"Interne serverfout"}}}
